metadata.description: A collection of agent plugins for LLM observability, API exploration, and development workflows

plugins.name: langfuse
plugins.description: General-purpose Langfuse integration — data exploration, dashboard/widget management, prompt versioning, dataset/experiment management, and more via conversational interface

plugins.name: openapi-tools
plugins.description: Skills for listing and inspecting OpenAPI endpoints on running services (FastAPI, etc.)

plugins.name: python-dev-workflow
plugins.description: Python development workflow — pytest execution and review helpers, conventional commits, PR creation, branch management, unit testing guidance, contradiction hunting, Celery support, and version bumping

plugins.name: general-plugins
plugins.description: General-purpose utilities for setup auditing, configuration management, workflow optimization, and task orchestration

plugins.name: job-hunt-toolkit
plugins.description: Version-controlled job application workspace: tailored CVs with HTML source + PDF export, per-company folders, HR-safe file naming, PDF metadata scrubbing, pre-send checklist, and integrated resume tailoring
